mapper.sql: id, engine_code, engine_name, engine_type, provider, base_url, auth_mode, api_key_secret_ref, default_engine, priority, timeout_seconds, retry_count, supported_file_types, output_format, max_pages_per_call, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ocr_engine_config where status = 'ENABLED' order by default_engine desc, priority desc, updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into ocr_engine_config ( id, engine_code, engine_name, engine_type, provider, base_url, auth_mode, api_key_secret_ref, default_engine, priority, timeout_seconds, retry_count, supported_file_types, output_format, max_pages_per_call, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{engineCode}, #{engineName}, #{engineType}, #{provider}, #{baseUrl}, #{authMode}, #{apiKeySecretRef}, #{defaultEngine}, #{priority}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{retryCount}, #{supportedFileTypes}, #{outputFormat}, #{maxPagesPerCall}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update ocr_engine_config set engine_code = #{engineCode}, engine_name = #{engineName}, engine_type = #{engineType}, provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, auth_mode = #{authMode}, api_key_secret_ref = #{apiKeySecretRef}, default_engine = #{defaultEngine}, priority = #{priority}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, supported_file_types = #{supportedFileTypes}, output_format = #{outputFormat}, max_pages_per_call = #{maxPagesPerCall}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update ocr_engine_config set status = #{status}, default_engine = case when #{status} = 'DISABLED' then '0' else default_engine end, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update ocr_engine_config set default_engine = '0', updated_at = current_timestamp
update ocr_engine_config set default_engine = '1', status = 'ENABLED', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
